description: PKB Starter — Full Skill Ecosystem Catalog. 43 entries extracted from live PKB installation: 35+ .claude/skills, 9 _vendor repos, 12 self-built skills, 2 plugin marketplace sources, 1 MCP server, 1 adapter-only entry. Skills are NOT bundled — installed on demand via install.py, install_skills.py, or skill_manager.py. Runtime management via /project:skills. z-skills/z-web-pack available as user-approved local install.

skills.name: Web Pack Collector
skills.description: Core web content collector: requests + BeautifulSoup + markdownify. Structured webpack output with README, manifest, 5 inventories. GitHub raw URL handling.
skills.notes: Always enabled. Part of PKB template core. Invoked via /project:web or /project:pkb <url>.
skills.short_description: Core web content collector that saves complete webpages with images, metadata, and structured inventories to your knowledge base.
skills.long_description: The primary web capture engine of PKB. It fetches URLs, extracts readable content via readability-lxml + trafilatura + BeautifulSoup fallback chain, downloads images with SHA256 dedup, and produces a structured webpack directory with README, manifest, and 5 inventory files. Handles GitHub repos specially via API + git clone.
best_for: Capturing GitHub repos and README docs
not_for: JavaScript-heavy SPAs that require browser rendering
Sites that block all automated requests
skills.risk_explanation: No external API calls or data uploads. Reads only public web content. Safe to use on any page. Does not read browser cookies or authentication state in safe mode.
skills.short_description_zh: 核心网页内容采集工具，将完整网页连同图片、元数据和结构化目录保存到知识库。
skills.long_description_zh: PKB 的主要网页抓取引擎。通过 readability-lxml + trafilatura + BeautifulSoup 降级链提取可读内容，使用 SHA256 去重下载图片，生成包含 README、manifest 和 5 个清单文件的结构化 webpack 目录。通过 API + git clone 特别处理 GitHub 仓库。
best_for_zh: 采集网页文章用于研究
抓取 GitHub 仓库和 README 文档
not_for_zh: 依赖浏览器渲染的 JS 重 SPA
阻止所有自动化请求的网站
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 无外部 API 调用或数据上传。仅读取公开网页内容。

skills.name: PKB Auto Pipeline
skills.description: Full autopilot ingest pipeline: classify → compile wiki → archive → health check → git commit. Invoked automatically by /project:pkb.
skills.notes: Always enabled. Core orchestration tool. Zero-interaction by default.
skills.short_description: Full autopilot ingest pipeline that takes anything (file, URL, text) and auto-classifies, compiles wiki pages, archives, and commits without asking.
skills.long_description: The central orchestration engine of PKB. Invoked by /project:pkb <anything>, it auto-detects input type (file/URL/GitHub/WeChat/text), runs the appropriate collector, classifies content by domain, creates structured wiki pages with proper frontmatter and [[wikilinks]], updates indices and logs, archives processed files, runs health checks, and git commits. Designed to be zero-interaction by default.
best_for: Users who want zero-friction knowledge management
not_for: Cases where you need to manually review every ingested item
Extremely sensitive documents that need human classification
When you want to customize every wiki page layout
skills.risk_explanation: Runs entirely locally. Automatically scans for API keys/tokens/PII before commit. Will block and warn if sensitive data is detected. The autopilot never deletes files from raw/.
skills.short_description_zh: 全自动入库流水线，自动采集、编译 wiki、归档并提交，不询问下一步。
skills.long_description_zh: PKB 的核心自动化引擎。从任意输入启动完整知识库流水线。全自动执行。
best_for_zh: 自动化知识管理工作流
not_for_zh: 需要人工审核每一步的场景
仅浏览而不入库的查询
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅操作本地文件和公开网页。内置敏感信息检测。

skills.name: Import to Inbox
skills.description: File import with sensitive data detection. Copies files to _INBOX, scans for API keys/tokens/PII before ingest.
skills.notes: Always enabled. Part of PKB template core. Invoked via /project:add or /project:pkb <file>.
skills.short_description: Safe file import tool that copies files to _INBOX while scanning for API keys, tokens, passwords, and PII before ingest.
skills.long_description: The gatekeeper for all file imports into PKB. Copies files (never moves originals) to _INBOX/imported/, generates manifest.json with source tracking, and runs sensitive data detection before anything enters the knowledge base. Handles individual files and directory imports with smart filtering (.git, node_modules, __pycache__ auto-skipped).
not_for: Files containing API keys or secrets (blocked)
skills.risk_explanation: No external data transmission. Scans file content for sensitive patterns before import. Blocks files with detected API keys/tokens/passwords and warns the user. Original files are never modified.
skills.short_description_zh: 文件导入工具，自动检测敏感信息并安全导入到 _INBOX。
skills.long_description_zh: 安全文件导入前端。扫描待导入文件的敏感信息，安全地将文件移入 _INBOX。
best_for_zh: 导入下载的文档到知识库
not_for_zh: 直接编辑 wiki 页面
处理二进制数据库文件
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅操作本地文件。内置敏感信息扫描。

skills.name: Sanitize Tool
skills.description: Privacy scanner with regex pattern detection: API keys, tokens, passwords, ID numbers, phone, email. Read-only scan mode + fix mode.
skills.notes: Always enabled. Part of PKB template core. Invoked via /project:sanitize. Also runs pre-commit.
skills.short_description: Privacy scanner that detects API keys, tokens, passwords, ID numbers, phone, email, and other sensitive patterns in your knowledge base.
skills.long_description: Built-in privacy protection for PKB. Uses regex patterns to scan your knowledge base for sensitive information: API keys, tokens, passwords, private keys, OAuth secrets, connection strings, Chinese ID numbers, phone numbers, and email addresses. Can run in read-only scan mode or fix mode that redacts detected patterns. Automatically invoked before every git commit by /project:save.
best_for: Checking imported documents for accidental PII
not_for: Guaranteed removal of all PII (no regex is perfect)
skills.risk_explanation: Reads your local files only. Never uploads data. Operates on disk only. The scan patterns are regex-based and may have false positives or negatives.
skills.short_description_zh: 扫描文件中的敏感信息（API key、token、PII）并提供修复。
skills.long_description_zh: 全面隐私和安全扫描器。支持 --fix 自动脱敏和 --json 机器可读输出。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅读取和分析文件。

skills.name: Documentation Updater
skills.description: Documentation freshness checker. Detects stale tool/wiki/command references in index.md, COMMANDS.md, SKILL_LINKS.md, log.md.
skills.notes: Always enabled. Part of PKB template core. Invoked via /project:docs-update or automatically by /project:save.
skills.short_description: Documentation freshness checker that detects stale references in project docs and auto-fixes them.
skills.long_description: Maintains consistency between your filesystem and project documentation. Detects drift in index.md, COMMANDS.md, SKILL_LINKS.md, and log.md — missing tool references, unregistered commands, undocumented skills, stale timestamps. Called automatically by /project:save and available standalone as /project:docs-update.
not_for: Fixing content in wiki/ pages (only touches project-level docs)
skills.risk_explanation: Reads and writes project-level markdown files only. Never touches wiki/ content or raw/ data. Changes are limited to adding missing entries and updating timestamps.
skills.short_description_zh: 检测项目文档与文件系统之间的差异，自动修复文档过时问题。
skills.long_description_zh: 文档新鲜度检测工具。自动更新工具列表、技能数量、提交历史等。
best_for_zh: 批量更新后自动刷新索引
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅编辑项目级 Markdown 文件。

skills.name: Obsidian Skills
skills.description: Claude Code skills for Obsidian vault management: create/rename/move notes, manage [[wikilinks]], Canvas whiteboards, Bases databases, web clipper integration.
skills.notes: Install via Claude Code plugin marketplace: /plugin marketplace add kepano/obsidian-skills. Enhances wiki/ vault interaction in Obsidian.
skills.short_description: Claude Code skills for Obsidian vault management: create, rename, move notes, manage wikilinks, Canvas whiteboards, and Bases databases.
skills.long_description: Integrates Claude Code with Obsidian's vault system. Lets you create and organize notes with proper [[wikilinks]], manage Canvas whiteboards visually, work with Bases (database-like tables), and use the Obsidian Web Clipper extension. Enhances the wiki/ browsing experience when you open your PKB as an Obsidian vault.
best_for: Users who browse their PKB wiki/ in Obsidian
skills.risk_explanation: Official plugin by Obsidian's creator (kepano). Installed via Claude Code plugin marketplace. Operates on your local markdown files. No data leaves your machine. Requires Obsidian desktop app for full functionality.
skills.short_description_zh: Obsidian 笔记应用集成技能。
skills.long_description_zh: Obsidian 集成工具集。JSON Canvas、Bases、CLI 功能。通过插件市场安装。
not_for_zh: 不使用 Obsidian 的用户
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 中风险。通过插件市场安装。

skills.name: Academic Research Skills (ARS)
skills.description: Full academic research pipeline: paper planning, literature review, outline generation, abstract writing, format conversion, citation checking, peer review simulation, revision handling.
skills.notes: Install via Claude Code plugin marketplace. 14 sub-skills covering the complete research workflow. Output routed to wiki/outputs/research/ and wiki/sources/.
skills.short_description: Full academic research pipeline: paper planning, literature review, outline generation, abstract writing, citation checking, peer review simulation, and format conversion.
skills.long_description: A comprehensive Claude Code plugin (14 sub-skills) covering the complete academic workflow. Includes research planning (research_architect_agent), literature review synthesis (synthesis_agent), paper outline generation, abstract writing, citation validation, format conversion between LaTeX/Word/Markdown, peer review simulation, and revision coaching. Output routes to wiki/outputs/research/ and wiki/sources/.
not_for: Users who don't need structured academic output
skills.risk_explanation: Installed via Claude Code plugin marketplace. Prompt-based (no executable scripts). May consume significant tokens for multi-agent research pipelines. Does not require API keys or external runtimes beyond Claude. Output is saved locally.
skills.short_description_zh: 完整学术研究流水线，含 31 个子技能。
skills.long_description_zh: 综合学术研究工具包。论文写作、文献综述、实验设计、数据分析等。通过插件市场安装。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 中风险。通过插件市场安装。按需启用子技能。

skills.name: Deep Research Skills
skills.description: Structured multi-turn deep research: topic scoping, multi-source information gathering, evidence synthesis, structured report generation. 5 sub-skills, prompt-only (no dangerous scripts).
skills.notes: MIT licensed. Prompt-only design (safe). May consume significant tokens for deep multi-turn research. Installed to .claude/skills/research*.
skills.short_description: Structured multi-turn deep research: topic scoping, multi-source information gathering, evidence synthesis, and structured report generation.
skills.long_description: A prompt-only skill set (5 sub-skills) designed for thorough multi-turn research. Starts with topic scoping and question decomposition, searches multiple sources iteratively, synthesizes findings with evidence tracking, and generates structured reports. Unlike single-pass search, it can go deeper on specific aspects and cross-reference across sources.
best_for: Complex research questions requiring multiple angles
not_for: Highly specialized domain research needing expert verification
skills.risk_explanation: MIT licensed. Prompt-only design — no executable code, no external API calls, no data upload. The main cost is token usage: deep multi-turn research can consume significant tokens. Output is saved locally to your wiki/.
skills.short_description_zh: 多源深度研究报告生成，包含事实核查和来源引用。
skills.long_description_zh: 深度研究工具。多轮搜索、多源交叉验证、对抗性事实核查。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅搜索和分析公开信息。

skills.name: Agent Research Skills
skills.license_status: NO LICENSE FILE — treat as all rights reserved
skills.description: Comprehensive agent-based research pipeline: 31 sub-skills covering literature search, paper writing, experiment design, data analysis, figure/table generation, citation management, peer review rebuttal. Tiered activation recommended.
skills.notes: NO LICENSE FILE — review terms before use. 31 sub-skills in 4 tiers. Tier 1 (essential): literature-search, literature-review, paper-writing-section, related-work-writing, idea-generation. Tier 2 (writing): algorithm-design, math-reasoning, experiment-design, experiment-code, data-analysis, figure-generation, table-generation, citation-management, self-review, paper-revision, rebuttal-writing. Tier 3 (advanced): code-debugging, github-research, deep-research, survey-generation, slide-generation. Tier 4 (specialized): paper-to-code, latex-formatting, paper-compilation, excalidraw-skill, novelty-assessment, research-planning, symbolic-equation, atomic-decomposition, backward-traceability, paper-assembly.
skills.short_description: Comprehensive agent-based research pipeline with 31 sub-skills covering literature search, paper writing, experiment design, data analysis, and peer review rebuttal.
skills.long_description: The most comprehensive academic research skill collection available. Organized in 4 tiers: Tier 1 (essential) covers literature search, review, paper section writing, and idea generation. Tier 2 (writing) adds algorithm design, experiment design, data analysis, figure/table generation, citation management, and paper revision. Tier 3 (advanced) includes code debugging, GitHub research, survey generation, and slide creation. Tier 4 (specialized) handles paper-to-code, LaTeX formatting, novelty assessment, and paper assembly. Selective activation recommended.
best_for: Systematic paper writing from idea to camera-ready
Complex experiment design and data analysis
not_for: Quick note-taking or simple literature searches
Users uncomfortable with NO LICENSE repos
skills.risk_explanation: NO LICENSE FILE — treat as all rights reserved. Use for personal reference only. 31 sub-skills across 4 tiers; selective activation recommended to manage complexity. Prompt-based design: no executable code beyond Claude Code skill invocations. Tier 2+ sub-skills generate analysis code — review before executing.
skills.short_description_zh: 多 Agent 协作研究工具，含 31 个子技能。
skills.long_description_zh: 多 Agent 研究编排工具。并行研究不同方面，自动综合结果。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 中风险。Agent 编排消耗较多 token。

skills.name: Literature Search
skills.license_status: NO LICENSE FILE — bundled in agent-research-skills
skills.description: Multi-source academic literature search: Semantic Scholar, arXiv, OpenAlex. Structured result list with titles, authors, abstracts, citation counts.
skills.notes: Part of agent-research-skills (Tier 1). Installed as individual skill from the monorepo. Invoked via /project:literature-search.
skills.short_description: Multi-source academic literature search across Semantic Scholar, arXiv, and OpenAlex with structured results including titles, authors, abstracts, and citation counts.
skills.long_description: Part of agent-research-skills (Tier 1). Searches multiple academic databases simultaneously: Semantic Scholar for broad coverage, arXiv for preprints, OpenAlex for open-access papers. Returns structured results with titles, authors, abstracts, publication dates, citation counts, and direct links. Can filter by date range and sort by relevance or citations.
best_for: Initial literature survey for a new research topic
Finding recent papers in a specific area
Checking what exists before starting a project
not_for: Paywalled content behind academic publisher walls
skills.risk_explanation: Part of agent-research-skills (NO LICENSE). Uses public academic APIs — no authentication needed. Search queries are sent to Semantic Scholar/arXiv/OpenAlex. Results are saved locally.
skills.short_description_zh: 学术文献搜索工具，支持多数据源检索。
skills.long_description_zh: 学术文献搜索助手。支持跨多个学术数据库搜索论文、筛选结果。
best_for_zh: 查找特定主题的最新论文
not_for_zh: 全文下载（需配合下载工具）
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 中风险。可能涉及外部 API 调用。

skills.name: Literature Review
skills.license_status: NO LICENSE FILE — bundled in agent-research-skills
skills.description: Multi-perspective dialogic literature review. Synthesizes papers through contrasting viewpoints, identifies research gaps and tensions.
skills.notes: Part of agent-research-skills (Tier 1). Invoked via /project:literature-review.
skills.short_description: Multi-perspective dialogic literature review that synthesizes papers through contrasting viewpoints, identifies research gaps and tensions.
skills.long_description: Part of agent-research-skills (Tier 1). Goes beyond simple paper summarization by creating a dialogic review: presents findings through contrasting perspectives, maps the research landscape, identifies gaps and tensions between papers, and suggests promising research directions. Produces structured literature review documents ready for paper introduction sections.
best_for: Writing paper introduction and related work sections
Understanding conflicting findings in a field
skills.risk_explanation: Part of agent-research-skills (NO LICENSE). Prompt-only — no external API calls. Synthesizes from papers you provide or that literature-search finds. Review the generated synthesis before citing in formal publications.
skills.short_description_zh: 文献综述写作工具，整理和综合跨来源研究成果。
skills.long_description_zh: 系统性文献综述助手。帮助组织论文发现、对比来源、识别研究空白。
best_for_zh: 撰写学术论文的文献综述
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 中风险。仅处理已下载的文献。

skills.name: Paper Section Writing
skills.license_status: NO LICENSE FILE — bundled in agent-research-skills
skills.description: Academic paper section drafting: structured writing with evidence support, citation placement, and academic tone.
skills.notes: Part of agent-research-skills (Tier 1). Invoked via /project:paper-writing-section.
skills.short_description: Academic paper section drafting with structured writing, evidence support, citation placement, and academic tone.
skills.long_description: Part of agent-research-skills (Tier 1). Helps draft individual paper sections (introduction, methods, results, discussion, conclusion) with proper academic structure. Incorporates evidence from your literature sources, suggests citation placements, maintains consistent academic tone, and ensures logical flow between sections.
best_for: Drafting paper sections with evidence integration
Overcoming writer's block with structured outlines
Ensuring consistent academic tone across sections
not_for: Final camera-ready writing without human revision
skills.risk_explanation: Part of agent-research-skills (NO LICENSE). Generates draft text based on provided sources. Always review and revise generated content before submission. Does not access external databases during writing.
skills.short_description_zh: 学术论文章节写作助手，基于已有资料生成草稿。
skills.long_description_zh: 辅助撰写学术论文各个章节。支持中英文双语输出。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。生成的文本仅基于用户提供的资料。

skills.name: Citation Management
skills.license_status: NO LICENSE FILE — bundled in agent-research-skills
skills.description: Citation collection, validation, and formatting. Supports GB/T 7714, APA 7.0, IEEE, MLA. Harvests missing citations from drafts using Semantic Scholar.
skills.notes: Part of agent-research-skills (Tier 2). Invoked via /project:citation-management.
skills.short_description: Citation collection, validation, and formatting supporting GB/T 7714, APA 7.0, IEEE, MLA. Harvests missing citations from drafts using Semantic Scholar.
skills.long_description: Part of agent-research-skills (Tier 2). Manages academic citations end-to-end: extracts citation keys from your draft, searches for complete metadata via Semantic Scholar, validates author names/dates/venues, formats citations in your chosen style (GB/T 7714 for Chinese journals, APA 7.0, IEEE, MLA), and generates formatted reference lists. Can also check existing citations for completeness.
best_for: Formatting reference lists for paper submission
not_for: Managing a personal reference library (use Zotero)
skills.risk_explanation: Part of agent-research-skills (NO LICENSE). Uses Semantic Scholar API for metadata lookup — no authentication needed. Always verify generated citations against the actual papers before submission.
skills.short_description_zh: 引用格式管理和校验，支持 APA/GB/T 7714/IEEE 等格式。
skills.long_description_zh: 引用格式工具。自动校验引用键、检查格式一致性、生成引用列表。
not_for_zh: 替代 Zotero 等引用管理器
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅操作本地引用数据。

skills.name: Data Analysis
skills.license_status: NO LICENSE FILE — bundled in agent-research-skills
skills.description: Statistical analysis code generation with 4-round review. Selects appropriate tests, interprets results, produces reports with p-values, effect sizes, confidence intervals.
skills.notes: Part of agent-research-skills (Tier 2). Invoked via /project:data-analysis. Generates Python code — review before execution.
skills.short_description: Statistical analysis code generation with 4-round review: selects appropriate tests, interprets results, produces reports with p-values, effect sizes, and confidence intervals.
skills.long_description: Part of agent-research-skills (Tier 2). Generates statistical analysis code in Python with a rigorous 4-round self-review process: (1) test selection based on data characteristics, (2) assumption checking and data preparation, (3) execution and result interpretation, (4) report generation with p-values, effect sizes, confidence intervals, and visualization recommendations. Supports common tests: t-tests, ANOVA, regression, chi-square, non-parametric alternatives.
best_for: Researchers who need statistical analysis but aren't statisticians
Validating analysis approach with multiple review rounds
not_for: Replacing consultation with a statistician for critical studies
Real-time data analysis or streaming data
skills.risk_explanation: Part of agent-research-skills (NO LICENSE). Generates Python analysis code — ALWAYS review before executing. The 4-round review improves reliability but does not guarantee correctness. Statistical results should be verified independently for publication.
skills.short_description_zh: 实验数据分析和可视化工具。
skills.long_description_zh: 数据分析助手。支持统计检验、数据清洗、可视化生成。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 中风险。需要用户理解数据含义。

skills.name: Code Debugging
skills.license_status: NO LICENSE FILE — bundled in agent-research-skills
skills.description: Systematic code debugging with root cause analysis, fix generation, and regression testing guidance.
skills.notes: Part of agent-research-skills (Tier 3). For research code debugging workflows.
skills.short_description: Systematic code debugging with root cause analysis, fix generation, and regression testing guidance.
skills.long_description: Part of agent-research-skills (Tier 3). Provides structured debugging for research code: reproduces the error, traces root cause through systematic hypothesis testing, generates targeted fixes with explanation, and suggests regression tests. Designed for the messy reality of research code where errors may be in logic, data processing, or library usage.
best_for: Debugging research code and analysis scripts
Understanding unexpected results in data pipelines
Fixing reproducible errors with systematic approach
not_for: Production system debugging (use proper debugging tools)
skills.risk_explanation: Part of agent-research-skills (NO LICENSE). Guides debugging — does not auto-execute code. Always review suggested fixes before applying. For safety, test fixes in an isolated environment first.
skills.short_description_zh: 代码错误诊断和修复建议。
skills.long_description_zh: 代码调试助手。分析错误日志、定位 bug、提出修复方案。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅分析和建议。

skills.name: GitHub Research
skills.license_status: NO LICENSE FILE — bundled in agent-research-skills
skills.description: GitHub repository research: code structure analysis, dependency mapping, contributor tracking, release history.
skills.notes: Part of agent-research-skills (Tier 3). For analyzing research code repositories.
skills.short_description: GitHub repository research: code structure analysis, dependency mapping, contributor tracking, and release history.
skills.long_description: Part of agent-research-skills (Tier 3). Analyzes GitHub repositories for research purposes: maps code structure and architecture, identifies key dependencies, tracks contributor activity and release history, assesses project maturity and maintenance status. Useful for evaluating research code repositories before building on them.
best_for: Evaluating research code repos before adoption
Assessing project maintenance and community health
skills.risk_explanation: Part of agent-research-skills (NO LICENSE). Uses public GitHub API — may hit rate limits without authentication. Only analyzes public repository metadata and structure, not private code.
skills.short_description_zh: GitHub 仓库分析和研究工具。
skills.long_description_zh: 分析 GitHub 仓库。可搜索仓库结构、提取文档、分析代码模式。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅读取公开仓库信息。

skills.name: Anthropic Official Skills
skills.description: Official Anthropic skill collection. Document processing (DOCX/PDF/PPTX/XLSX), creative tools (art, design, themes), development (MCP builder, webapp testing), enterprise (brand guidelines, internal comms).
skills.notes: Apache 2.0 for most skills. docx/pdf/pptx/xlsx are source-available (not open source) — reference only. Document output routed to wiki/outputs/.
skills.short_description: Official Anthropic skill collection: document processing (DOCX/PDF/PPTX/XLSX), creative tools, MCP builder, webapp testing, and enterprise brand guidelines.
skills.long_description: Anthropic's official Claude Code skill repository with 17+ skills. Document processing skills handle DOCX creation/editing, PDF generation, PPTX presentations, and XLSX spreadsheets. Creative tools include algorithmic art, canvas design, and theme factories. Development tools include MCP server builder and webapp testing. Enterprise tools cover brand guidelines and internal communications. Most skills are Apache 2.0 licensed; docx/pdf/pptx/xlsx are source-available.
not_for: Users who only need basic document conversion (use document-converter)
skills.risk_explanation: Apache 2.0 for most skills; docx/pdf/pptx/xlsx are source-available (not open source). Prompt-based design. Document processing skills generate files locally — no cloud upload. Review generated documents before sharing. Selective installation recommended.
skills.short_description_zh: Anthropic 官方技能集合。
skills.long_description_zh: Anthropic 官方提供的技能集合。Claude API 使用、提示工程最佳实践。
best_for_zh: 学习 Claude API 使用
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。官方维护。

skills.name: Document Converter
skills.description: Document format conversion: DOCX/PDF/PPTX ↔ Markdown. Handles text extraction, structure preservation, and encoding.
skills.notes: PKB self-built. Part of core template. Invoked via /project:doc. Requires python-docx, python-pptx, PyPDF2.
skills.short_description: Document format conversion: DOCX/PDF/PPTX to and from Markdown with text extraction and structure preservation.
skills.long_description: PKB self-built document conversion skill. Converts common academic and office formats to Markdown for wiki integration. Handles DOCX (Word) text extraction with heading structure, PDF text extraction with page awareness, PPTX (PowerPoint) slide-to-markdown conversion with speaker notes. Also supports Markdown-to-DOCX for output generation. Requires python-docx, python-pptx, and PyPDF2 packages.
best_for: Converting course handouts to wiki pages
Extracting text from PDF papers for search
skills.risk_explanation: PKB self-built (MIT). Runs entirely locally. Reads files you provide, writes Markdown to your wiki/. Does not modify original files. Requires Python packages listed in requirements.txt.
skills.short_description_zh: 文档格式转换工具（DOCX/PDF/PPTX/Markdown 互转）。
skills.long_description_zh: 多格式文档转换器。使用 LibreOffice 或 pandoc 作为后端。
best_for_zh: 标准化知识库文档格式
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅转换文件格式。

skills.name: OCR Helper
skills.description: OCR processing for images and scanned PDFs. Fallback chain: Windows OCR API → Tesseract → xparse-cli. Output routed to raw/imported_processed/.
skills.notes: PKB self-built. Requires Tesseract OCR or xparse-cli for non-Windows. Invoked via /project:ocr.
skills.short_description: OCR processing for images and scanned PDFs using Windows OCR API, Tesseract, or xparse-cli fallback chain.
skills.long_description: PKB self-built OCR skill for extracting text from images and scanned documents. Uses a fallback chain: Windows OCR API (built-in, no install) on Windows, Tesseract OCR (open source, cross-platform), or xparse-cli (third-party tool). Output is routed to raw/imported_processed/ as extracted text files ready for wiki compilation.
best_for: OCR on photos of documents or whiteboards
skills.risk_explanation: Medium risk due to external runtime dependency (Tesseract or xparse-cli). PKB self-built (MIT). Requires installing Tesseract OCR separately on non-Windows systems or using xparse-cli. OCR runs entirely locally — no cloud OCR services used.
skills.short_description_zh: 图片和扫描件文字识别工具。支持中英文混合识别。
skills.long_description_zh: OCR 文字识别助手。从图片、扫描 PDF 中提取文字。
best_for_zh: 提取扫描版 PDF 文字
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅处理本地文件。

skills.name: Web Clipper Helper
skills.description: Browser clipping assistant: integrates with MarkDownload and Obsidian Web Clipper browser extensions. Enhances /project:clip for rich content capture.
skills.notes: PKB self-built. Enhances clipboard-to-PKB workflow. Requires browser extensions for full functionality.
skills.short_description: Browser clipping assistant that integrates with MarkDownload and Obsidian Web Clipper browser extensions for rich content capture.
skills.long_description: PKB self-built helper for browser-based content clipping. Works with the MarkDownload extension (converts web pages to clean Markdown) and Obsidian Web Clipper (captures structured content directly to Obsidian vault). Enhances the /project:clip command with richer metadata extraction and proper PKB directory routing.
best_for: Quick web page clipping while browsing
Research sessions with many pages to save
not_for: Users who don't use browser extensions
skills.risk_explanation: PKB self-built (MIT). Requires browser extensions for full functionality. The skill itself only routes and processes content already captured by extensions. No direct web access.
skills.short_description_zh: 快速网页剪藏工具，保存网页内容到知识库。
skills.long_description_zh: 轻量级网页剪藏助手。快速保存网页文本到 _INBOX。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅读取公开网页内容。

skills.name: Prompt Library
skills.description: AI prompt library management: save, search, reuse, version prompts. Tagged and categorized for quick retrieval.
skills.notes: PKB self-built. Invoked via /project:prompt. Stores prompts in wiki/prompts/.
skills.short_description: AI prompt library management: save, search, reuse, and version your best prompts with tags and categories.
skills.long_description: PKB self-built prompt management skill. Stores your best AI prompts in a searchable, tagged library under wiki/prompts/. Tracks prompt versions, use cases, and effectiveness notes. Lets you quickly retrieve prompts by category or keyword. Useful for anyone who works extensively with AI models and wants to build a reusable prompt collection.
best_for: AI power users building prompt collections
Creative professionals iterating on AI image/text prompts
not_for: Storing API keys or credentials in prompts (blocked)
Real-time prompt optimization or A/B testing
skills.risk_explanation: PKB self-built (MIT). Stores prompts as local markdown files. The sanitize-tool scans prompt content for accidentally included API keys. No prompts are uploaded anywhere.
skills.short_description_zh: AI 提示词管理和版本控制工具。
skills.long_description_zh: 提示词库管理器。存储、分类、版本化 AI 提示词模板。
not_for_zh: 替代 AI 模型训练
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅管理本地文本模板。

skills.name: Song Archive
skills.description: Lyrics and Suno AI style version management. Track song versions, style prompts, and generation metadata.
skills.notes: PKB self-built. Invoked via /project:song. Stores song data in wiki/creation/songs/.
skills.short_description: Lyrics and Suno AI style version management: track song versions, style prompts, and generation metadata.
skills.long_description: PKB self-built archive for AI-generated music. Manages song lyrics, Suno AI style prompts, version history, and generation metadata. Organizes songs by genre, mood, and style. Tracks which prompts produced which results for iterative refinement. Output stored in wiki/creation/songs/.
best_for: Building a personal AI music catalog
not_for: Audio file storage (stores metadata, not audio)
skills.risk_explanation: PKB self-built (MIT). Stores text metadata only — not audio files. Be mindful of copyright when archiving lyrics from existing songs. Generated content stays local.
skills.short_description_zh: 歌曲和歌词版本管理系统。
skills.long_description_zh: 创意作品存档工具。管理歌词、歌曲版本和创作过程记录。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。纯文本管理。

skills.name: Script Breakdown
skills.description: Script/screenplay breakdown: scene analysis → storyboard generation → AI image generation prompts. Structured output for film/video pre-production.
skills.notes: PKB self-built. Invoked via /project:script. Output in wiki/creation/scripts/.
skills.short_description: Script/screenplay breakdown: scene analysis, storyboard generation, and AI image generation prompts for film/video pre-production.
skills.long_description: PKB self-built creative pre-production tool. Takes a script or screenplay and breaks it down scene by scene: identifies characters, locations, props, mood, and visual requirements. Generates storyboard descriptions and AI image generation prompts (Midjourney/DALL-E/Stable Diffusion format) for each scene. Output organized in wiki/creation/scripts/.
best_for: Filmmakers and video creators in pre-production
Generating consistent AI image prompts from scripts
not_for: Final storyboard artwork generation (generates prompts, not images)
skills.risk_explanation: PKB self-built (MIT). Text processing only — reads scripts, generates text prompts. No image generation. Does not require API keys for image services (you use the prompts separately).
skills.short_description_zh: 影视剧本拆解和分镜分析工具。
skills.long_description_zh: 剧本分析工具。拆解为场景、角色、道具元素，生成分镜表。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅处理文本分析。

skills.name: Git Versioning
skills.description: Enhanced git save/rollback: smart commit message generation, pre-commit secret scan, safe rollback with diff preview. Extends /project:save and /project:rollback.
skills.notes: PKB self-built. Core meta skill. Always enabled. Includes secret-scan functionality before commit.
skills.short_description: Enhanced git save/rollback with smart commit message generation, pre-commit secret scan, and safe rollback with diff preview.
skills.long_description: PKB self-built meta skill that extends git operations with PKB-specific intelligence. Generates descriptive commit messages based on changed files and wiki page types. Runs secret-scan before every commit and blocks on critical findings. Provides safe rollback with diff preview before reverting. Supports viewing recent commit history formatted for knowledge base workflow.
skills.risk_explanation: PKB self-built (MIT). Runs standard git commands with safety checks. Never force-pushes. The rollback shows diff before reverting. Does not modify git configuration.
skills.short_description_zh: 增强的 git 保存和回滚功能，含安全扫描。
skills.long_description_zh: Git 工作流增强工具。自动提交信息、安全预检、变更摘要。
best_for_zh: 自动化 git 工作流
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。标准 git 操作增强。

skills.name: Skill Creator
skills.description: New skill creation wizard: guided workflow for creating Claude Code skills with proper SKILL.md frontmatter, command registration, and adapter setup.
skills.notes: PKB self-built. Invoked via /project:make-skill. Creates skills in skills/<category>/.
skills.short_description: New skill creation wizard: guided workflow for creating Claude Code skills with proper SKILL.md frontmatter and command registration.
skills.long_description: PKB self-built tool for extending your knowledge base with custom skills. Provides a guided wizard that creates properly structured skill directories under skills/<category>/, generates SKILL.md with correct frontmatter, registers commands in .claude/commands/, and sets up adapter routing if needed. Ensures new skills follow PKB conventions and are properly documented.
not_for: Creating skills for distribution (use Anthropic's skill-creator)
skills.risk_explanation: PKB self-built (MIT). Creates markdown and configuration files only. Does not execute any code. New skills are inert until explicitly invoked in Claude Code.
skills.short_description_zh: 创建和编辑自定义 PKB 技能的工具。
skills.long_description_zh: Agent 技能创建向导。帮助设计新技能、配置输出路由、注册到目录。
best_for_zh: 创建自定义知识库技能
not_for_zh: 修改 PKB 核心系统文件
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅生成本地技能定义文件。

skills.name: Skill Lint
skills.description: Skill health check: validates SKILL.md frontmatter, checks command registrations, verifies script references, ensures .gitignore coverage.
skills.notes: PKB self-built. Invoked via /project:skill-lint. Ensures skill ecosystem consistency.
skills.short_description: Skill health check: validates SKILL.md frontmatter, checks command registrations, verifies script references, and ensures .gitignore coverage.
skills.long_description: PKB self-built quality assurance tool for the skill ecosystem. Validates that all skills have proper SKILL.md with required frontmatter fields, checks that every registered command has a corresponding .md file and vice versa, verifies that scripts referenced in skills actually exist, and ensures vendored skills are covered by .gitignore. Keeps your skill collection consistent and maintainable.
not_for: Security auditing of third-party skill code
skills.risk_explanation: PKB self-built (MIT). Read-only analysis of markdown and configuration files. Does not execute any skill code. Reports issues for human resolution.
skills.short_description_zh: PKB 技能质量检查和格式验证工具。
skills.long_description_zh: 技能质量检查器。验证格式、检查必需字段、检测重复。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅读取和验证本地配置。

skills.name: Secret Scan
skills.description: Pre-commit secret scanning: detects API keys, tokens, passwords, private keys, OAuth secrets, connection strings, PII patterns. Blocks commit on critical findings.
skills.notes: PKB self-built. Bundled with git-versioning. Runs automatically before every /project:save commit.
skills.short_description: Pre-commit secret scanning: detects API keys, tokens, passwords, private keys, OAuth secrets, connection strings, and PII patterns in staged files.
skills.long_description: PKB self-built security scanner that runs automatically before every git commit. Uses regex patterns to detect: API keys (various formats), authentication tokens, database connection strings, private keys (SSH, PGP, SSL), OAuth client secrets, and PII patterns (Chinese ID numbers, phone numbers, email addresses). Blocks the commit if critical patterns are found and warns on potential PII. Also available as standalone scan.
not_for: Guaranteed detection of all secrets (no regex is perfect)
skills.risk_explanation: PKB self-built (MIT). Reads staged git files only. Never uploads data. False positives may block commits — review and adjust. False negatives are possible for obfuscated secrets.
skills.short_description_zh: 深度密钥和敏感信息扫描，预提交检查。
skills.long_description_zh: 深度安全扫描器。git 提交前检查敏感数据。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅读取和分析文件。

skills.name: QMD Semantic Search
skills.description: Hybrid semantic search over local markdown knowledge bases: BM25 + vector embeddings + LLM reranking. CLI tool with optional MCP server mode.
skills.notes: MIT licensed. Requires Node.js 22+. Auto-downloads GGUF embedding model (~2GB). Search results do not modify wiki. Route through /project:search.
skills.short_description: Hybrid semantic search over local markdown knowledge bases: BM25 + vector embeddings + LLM reranking with optional MCP server mode.
skills.long_description: QMD (Query Markdown) provides powerful local semantic search across your markdown knowledge base. Combines three search strategies: BM25 for keyword matching, vector embeddings for semantic similarity, and LLM reranking for result quality. Can run as a CLI tool for one-off searches or as an MCP server for continuous availability in Claude Code. Auto-downloads a GGUF embedding model (~2GB) on first run.
best_for: Finding semantically related notes across your entire wiki/
Deep search beyond simple keyword matching
not_for: Small knowledge bases (<50 pages — simple grep may suffice)
Users with limited disk space (embedding model is ~2GB)
skills.risk_explanation: MIT licensed. Requires Node.js 22+. Auto-downloads ~2GB GGUF embedding model on first run. All processing is local — no data leaves your machine. MCP server mode needs manual .claude/mcp.json configuration. PKB never auto-configures MCP.
skills.short_description_zh: 基于语义的代码搜索和分析工具。
skills.long_description_zh: 语义代码搜索引擎。使用 AST 解析，比 grep 更精准。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅读取和分析本地代码。

skills.name: Kanban Board
skills.description: Markdown file-based Kanban board management. Cards = .md files, status = YAML frontmatter. Columns: Backlog/To Do/In Progress/Done. Pure local markdown operations.
skills.notes: Apache 2.0 licensed. Invoked via /project:kanban. Stores board data in wiki/tasks/. Safe: no external dependencies.
skills.short_description: Markdown file-based Kanban board management: cards as .md files, status in YAML frontmatter, columns Backlog/To Do/In Progress/Done.
skills.long_description: A lightweight project management skill that uses your PKB file system as a Kanban board. Each task is a markdown file with YAML frontmatter tracking status, priority, and assignments. Columns map to directories under wiki/tasks/. Zero external dependencies — pure local markdown. Invoked via /project:kanban for board operations.
best_for: Lightweight workflow management without external tools
not_for: Team project management with multiple contributors
skills.risk_explanation: Apache 2.0 licensed. Operates entirely on local markdown files. No external services, no API calls, no data upload. Cannot accidentally delete tasks — just moves files between directories.
skills.short_description_zh: 项目看板管理工具，支持任务跟踪和可视化。
skills.long_description_zh: 看板项目管理工具。数据存储在本地 Markdown，兼容 Obsidian Kanban。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。所有数据存储在本地。

skills.name: Enhanced Sanitizer
skills.description: Enhanced sensitive information scanner and anonymizer. Pattern-based detection for API keys, tokens, ID numbers, phone, email. Read-only scan + redaction mode.
skills.notes: MIT licensed. Complements built-in sanitize tool with additional patterns. PKB-adapted version integrated at /project:sanitize.
skills.short_description: Enhanced sensitive information scanner and anonymizer with additional patterns beyond the built-in sanitize-tool.
skills.long_description: An external skill (MIT licensed) that complements PKB's built-in sanitize-tool with additional detection patterns and anonymization capabilities. Detects API keys, tokens, ID numbers, phone numbers, and email addresses in markdown files. Supports read-only scan mode and redaction mode. Integrates with /project:sanitize for an enhanced privacy scanning workflow.
best_for: Enhanced PII detection beyond built-in patterns
Redacting sensitive data from wiki pages
skills.risk_explanation: MIT licensed. Reads and potentially modifies local markdown files (in fix mode). Always run in read-only scan mode first to review findings. Make a git commit before running fix mode so you can rollback.
skills.short_description_zh: 全面隐私清理技能，检测并脱敏个人数据。
skills.long_description_zh: 高级隐私清理器。检测多种个人信息并脱敏。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅处理本地文件。

skills.name: Tapestry Skills
skills.description: Collection of practical Claude Code skills: article extraction (readability-cli → trafilatura → curl fallback), YouTube transcript (yt-dlp), learning capture, scrum facilitation, session logging, ship/learn workflow.
skills.notes: MIT licensed. article-extractor and youtube-transcript are PKB-integrated. Other sub-skills are general-purpose. Selective install recommended.
skills.short_description: Collection of 7 practical Claude Code skills: article extraction, YouTube transcripts, learning capture, scrum facilitation, session logging, and more.
skills.long_description: A well-rounded skill collection by michalparkola (MIT licensed). Includes: article-extractor (fast single-page extraction with readability-cli→trafilatura→curl fallback), youtube-transcript (transcript extraction via yt-dlp), learn-this (capture learning moments), scrum-sage (scrum facilitation), session-log (session recording), ship-learn-next (continuous improvement workflow), and unblock-action (getting unstuck). Selective installation recommended.
best_for: Users wanting a curated set of general-purpose skills
not_for: Users who only need one specific skill (install individually)
Enterprise environments requiring per-skill license review
Replacing PKB's core web_pack for full web collection
skills.risk_explanation: MIT licensed. 7 independent sub-skills. article-extractor uses external CLI tools (readability-cli, trafilatura). youtube-transcript requires yt-dlp. Other sub-skills are prompt-only. Selective install recommended to minimize dependencies.
skills.short_description_zh: Tapestry 内容整合工具技能。
skills.long_description_zh: Tapestry 内容整合工具。多源内容聚合、时间线视图、内容筛选。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 中风险。外部工具集成。

skills.name: Article Extractor
skills.description: Single web article fast extraction. Three-tier fallback: readability-cli → trafilatura → curl. Complements /project:web (full webpack) with quick single-page clipping.
skills.notes: Part of tapestry-skills. Invoked via /project:article-extract. Fast alternative to full web_pack for single articles.
skills.short_description: Single web article fast extraction with three-tier fallback: readability-cli → trafilatura → curl. Complements full web_pack with quick single-page clipping.
skills.long_description: Part of tapestry-skills (MIT). Designed for fast extraction of single web articles when you don't need the full web_pack pipeline. Uses a three-tier extraction strategy: readability-cli for best results, trafilatura as Python fallback, curl + basic HTML parsing as last resort. Much faster than a full webpack — ideal for research sessions where you're collecting many individual articles.
best_for: When web_pack full mode is too slow
Collecting reading materials for later deep processing
not_for: Full page archival with images (use web_pack)
Batch URL collection (web_pack is better for this)
skills.risk_explanation: MIT licensed (bundled in tapestry-skills). Uses local CLI tools. No API keys needed. No data upload. Can be slower on sites that block automated requests.
skills.short_description_zh: 从网页和文档中提取结构化文章内容。
skills.long_description_zh: 智能文章提取器。去除导航、广告，输出干净 Markdown。
best_for_zh: 批量处理 RSS 订阅
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅读取公开网页。

skills.name: YouTube Transcript
skills.description: YouTube/Bilibili video transcript extraction. Fallback chain: manual captions → auto-generated captions → Whisper. Uses yt-dlp locally.
skills.notes: Part of tapestry-skills. Invoked via /project:youtube-transcript. Requires yt-dlp. No API key needed.
skills.short_description: YouTube/Bilibili video transcript extraction via yt-dlp with fallback chain: manual captions → auto-generated captions → Whisper.
skills.long_description: Part of tapestry-skills (MIT). Extracts transcripts from YouTube and Bilibili videos for knowledge base integration. Uses yt-dlp for reliable extraction with a fallback chain: first tries manual captions (highest quality), then auto-generated captions, and optionally Whisper for videos without any captions. Output is saved as markdown in your knowledge base for search and reference.
best_for: Extracting speaker notes from conference talks
Saving tutorial/instructional video content as searchable text
not_for: Music videos or content where transcript has no value
Live streams (need to wait for recording)
skills.risk_explanation: MIT licensed (bundled in tapestry-skills). Requires yt-dlp (external dependency). All processing is local. No API keys needed. Be mindful of copyright when archiving transcripts.
skills.short_description_zh: 获取 YouTube 视频字幕和文本记录。
skills.long_description_zh: YouTube 字幕提取器。支持多语言字幕获取。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 中风险。需要网络访问。

skills.name: YouTube Skills Collection
skills.description: Comprehensive YouTube skill collection: transcript/caption extraction, channel analysis, playlist management, search. Some sub-skills require TranscriptAPI.com API key.
skills.notes: MIT licensed. 12 sub-skills. transcriptapi and youtube-api variants require API key. The yt-dlp based sub-skills (captions, subtitles) do not. Use tapestry-skills youtube-transcript for a lighter alternative.
skills.short_description: Comprehensive YouTube skill collection: 12 sub-skills for transcript/caption extraction, channel analysis, playlist management, and search.
skills.long_description: A comprehensive YouTube interaction skill set (MIT licensed, 12 sub-skills). Includes: captions and subtitles extraction via yt-dlp, TranscriptAPI.com integration for high-quality transcripts, YouTube Data API integration for channel/playlist/search operations, and bulk video data collection. Some sub-skills require a TranscriptAPI.com API key; the yt-dlp based sub-skills do not.
not_for: Simple transcript extraction (use youtube-transcript from tapestry)
Users without YouTube Data API access (some features limited)
skills.risk_explanation: MIT licensed. 12 sub-skills. Some require TranscriptAPI.com API key or YouTube Data API key — PKB never stores these. Configure API keys yourself. yt-dlp based sub-skills (captions, subtitles) don't need API keys and are safer to start with.
skills.short_description_zh: YouTube 视频相关的综合工具集。
skills.long_description_zh: YouTube 相关工具集合。含字幕获取、频道分析、内容归档。
best_for_zh: 系统性学习 YouTube 课程
not_for_zh: 下载受版权保护的视频
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 中风险。需要网络访问和 API 使用。

skills.name: CNKI Skills
skills.description: CNKI (中国知网) database interaction via Chrome DevTools MCP. Search, browse, download PDF/CAJ, export citations. 10 sub-skills + 1 orchestrator agent (cnki-researcher). PKB bridge: /project:pkb-cnki.
skills.notes: HIGH RISK — Requires: (1) Chrome --remote-debugging-port=9222, (2) CNKI institutional login, (3) Chrome DevTools MCP configured. Captcha handling requires manual intervention. PKB provides cnki_setup.py for one-click MCP setup.
skills.short_description: CNKI (China National Knowledge Infrastructure) database interaction via Chrome DevTools MCP: search, browse, download PDF/CAJ, and export citations.
skills.long_description: A comprehensive skill collection for interacting with CNKI (中国知网), the largest Chinese academic database. Uses Chrome DevTools MCP to control a browser with your CNKI login session. Includes 10 sub-skills: search, advanced search, paper detail view, PDF/CAJ download, citation export, result parsing, page navigation, journal search, journal index browsing, and table of contents extraction. PKB provides a cnki-researcher orchestrator agent and cnki_setup.py for one-click MCP configuration.
best_for: Downloading CNKI papers with institutional access
Systematic literature collection from Chinese journals
not_for: Users without CNKI institutional access (most content is paywalled)
skills.risk_explanation: HIGH RISK. Requires: (1) Chrome running with --remote-debugging-port=9222, (2) valid CNKI institutional login, (3) Chrome DevTools MCP configured in .claude/mcp.json. Captcha handling requires manual user intervention. CNKI may rate-limit or block automated access. PKB includes cnki_setup.py for safe MCP configuration but never auto-configures it.
skills.short_description_zh: 中国知网 CNKI 文献检索和下载工具。
skills.long_description_zh: CNKI 集成工具。需 CNKI 账号和 Chrome DevTools MCP 连接。适合中文文献研究。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 高风险。需要登录和 MCP 配置。需明确确认安装。

skills.name: Zotero MCP Server
skills.description: MCP server connecting Claude Code to Zotero reference manager. Search local Zotero library, import references, access collections and attachments.
skills.notes: HIGH RISK — Requires: (1) Zotero running locally with Better BibTeX plugin, (2) Node.js environment, (3) .claude/mcp.json configuration. This is an MCP server, not a skill.
skills.short_description: MCP server connecting Claude Code to Zotero reference manager: search local library, import references, access collections and attachments.
skills.long_description: An MCP (Model Context Protocol) server that bridges Claude Code with your local Zotero reference manager. Enables searching your Zotero library directly from Claude Code, importing new references, browsing collections, and accessing attachments. Requires Zotero running locally with the Better BibTeX plugin installed. This is infrastructure — not a skill you invoke directly, but a server that skills can use.
best_for: Integrating Zotero references into PKB wiki pages
Searching personal reference library from Claude Code
not_for: Users uncomfortable configuring MCP servers manually
skills.risk_explanation: HIGH RISK. Requires: (1) Zotero desktop running locally, (2) Better BibTeX plugin for Zotero, (3) Node.js environment, (4) manual .claude/mcp.json configuration. PKB never auto-configures MCP servers. This is third-party infrastructure — review the repo's security before installing.
skills.short_description_zh: Zotero 引用管理器集成，通过 MCP 协议。
skills.long_description_zh: 通过 MCP 服务器连接本地 Zotero 数据库。需单独配置 MCP。
not_for_zh: 替代 Zotero 桌面应用
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 高风险。需 Zotero 和 MCP 服务器配置。

skills.name: Zotero MCP Skill
skills.description: Claude Code skill companion for zotero-mcp. Provides bibliography management, citation search, and reference import workflows.
skills.notes: HIGH RISK — Depends on zotero-mcp being installed and configured first. Both must be operational.
skills.short_description: Claude Code skill companion for zotero-mcp: bibliography management, citation search, and reference import workflows.
skills.long_description: A Claude Code skill that works on top of the zotero-mcp server. Provides user-friendly workflows for bibliography management, citation searching, reference importing, and collection organization. Requires zotero-mcp to be installed and configured first — it cannot function independently. Useful for researchers who want to manage their Zotero library through natural language commands in Claude Code.
best_for: Managing Zotero library from Claude Code
skills.risk_explanation: HIGH RISK. Depends on zotero-mcp being installed and operational. Both components must be configured correctly. MCP configuration is manual — PKB never auto-configures. Review both repos for security before installing.
skills.short_description_zh: Zotero 技能集成，通过 Skill 方式调用。
skills.long_description_zh: 与 Zotero MCP 不同的集成方式。需对应 MCP 配置。
not_for_zh: 无 Zotero 安装的环境
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 高风险。需 Zotero 和 MCP 配置。

skills.name: Z-Skills (tjxj)
skills.description: Third-party skill collection that includes z-web-pack. PKB Starter does NOT redistribute its code. The user must explicitly choose to install it into skills/_vendor/z-skills/ for local use. The adapter only connects selected outputs into the PKB raw/wiki workflow.
skills.notes: NOT bundled, NOT distributed, NOT auto-installed. User must explicitly consent to git clone from tjxj/z-skills. After clone, goes to pending_audit. Must pass audit and enable before any adapter functions. See docs/Z_WEB_PACK_PARITY.md for PKB's independent web_pack comparison.
skills.short_description: Third-party skill collection that includes z-web-pack. User-installed into skills/_vendor for local use; PKB Starter does not redistribute its code.
skills.long_description: This repository can be installed by the user into skills/_vendor for local use. PKB Starter does not redistribute its code. The adapter only connects selected outputs into the PKB raw/wiki workflow. The user must explicitly consent to installation, audit the repository's license status, and explicitly enable the adapter before any z-skills code is invoked.
best_for: Users who want to use z-web-pack as an alternative collector backend
Users who already use z-skills and want PKB integration
Comparing z-web-pack output with PKB's built-in web_pack
not_for: Default PKB installation (requires explicit user opt-in)
Users who don't need advanced web collection features
Replacing PKB's built-in web_pack (z-web-pack is an optional alternative)
skills.risk_explanation: This is a third-party repository with per-directory licensing concerns. It should be downloaded only with user consent, audited before use, and never redistributed as part of PKB Starter. The adapter only connects z-web-pack output into PKB raw/webpacks and wiki ingestion — it does not execute z-skills code automatically.
skills.short_description_zh: 用户授权本地安装的 Z 技能集合，含 z-web-pack 替代采集器。
skills.long_description_zh: Z 技能集合。需用户明确同意安装。PKB 不分发代码。安装后需审计并手动启用。
best_for_zh: 使用 z-web-pack 替代采集器
not_for_zh: 无需替代采集器的场景
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 高风险。需明确键入 INSTALL 确认。代码从外部仓库克隆。

skills.name: Z-Web-Pack Local Adapter
skills.description: Adapter for using a user-installed local copy of z-web-pack with PKB. Does NOT include z-web-pack code. Detects local user-installed z-skills checkout, audits it, then connects z-web-pack outputs into PKB raw/webpacks and wiki ingestion.
skills.notes: Cannot be installed independently. Requires z-skills to be installed first (--install z-skills). The adapter does not include z-web-pack code. It only bridges outputs after user has installed and audited z-skills.
skills.short_description: Adapter for using a user-installed local copy of z-web-pack with PKB. Does not include z-web-pack code.
skills.long_description: This adapter does not include z-web-pack code. It detects a local user-installed z-skills checkout, audits it, then connects z-web-pack outputs into PKB raw/webpacks and wiki ingestion. The user must install z-skills first, audit the repository, and explicitly enable this adapter before it becomes usable as a collector backend.
best_for: Using z-web-pack as an alternative collector backend after installing z-skills
Routing z-web-pack output into PKB raw/webpacks automatically
Comparing z-web-pack and PKB web_pack output side by side
not_for: Users who haven't audited z-skills license status
Default PKB setup (basic collector is the default)
skills.risk_explanation: The adapter may invoke local third-party code from skills/_vendor/z-skills/. The user must audit and explicitly enable it before use. PKB Starter never distributes z-skills code. The adapter only routes output — it does not modify z-skills source.
skills.short_description_zh: 替代网页采集后端（基于 z-skills 的 z-web-pack）。
skills.long_description_zh: 作为 PKB 内置 web_pack.py 的替代选择。需先安装 z-skills 并审计。
best_for_zh: 需要更强采集能力的场景
作为内置采集器的补充
not_for_zh: 不想安装 z-skills 的用户
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 高风险。依赖 z-skills 安装。

skills.name: Awesome Agent Skills Index
skills.description: Curated index of Claude Code agent skills across the ecosystem. Discovery resource — browse to find new skills.
skills.notes: Index/reference only. No executable skills. Useful for discovering new skills to add to the catalog.
skills.short_description: Curated index of Claude Code agent skills across the ecosystem. Discovery resource for finding new skills.
skills.long_description: A community-curated index of Claude Code agent skills maintained by VoltAgent. Browse to discover new skills across categories: research, development, creative, productivity, and more. Not a skill itself — a discovery resource. Useful for finding skills that haven't been added to the PKB catalog yet.
not_for: Direct installation (links to individual skill repos)
skills.risk_explanation: Reference index. No executable code. Links to external repos — review each repo's license and security before installing. PKB does not endorse or vet linked skills.
skills.short_description_zh: 精选 Agent 技能合集。
skills.long_description_zh: 社区精选的 Agent 技能集合。常用自动化任务、代码辅助、文档生成。
best_for_zh: 快速获取常用 Agent 能力
not_for_zh: 需要严格安全审查的场景
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 中风险。社区维护。

skills.name: Awesome Claude Skills Index
skills.description: Composio-curated index of Claude Code skills and tools. Discovery resource — browse to find new skills.
skills.notes: Index/reference only. No executable skills. Useful for discovering new skills.
skills.short_description: Composio-curated index of Claude Code skills and tools. Discovery resource for finding new skills.
skills.long_description: A curated index by ComposioHQ listing Claude Code skills, tools, and integrations across the ecosystem. Browse to discover skills across research, development, content creation, and automation categories. Useful as a second opinion alongside the VoltAgent index.
not_for: Direct installation (links to individual skill repos)
skills.risk_explanation: Reference index. No executable code. Links to external repos — review each repo's license and security before installing.
skills.short_description_zh: 精选 Claude 使用技巧和技能集合。
skills.long_description_zh: Claude 使用技巧精选集合。提示模板、工作流示例、最佳实践指南。
best_for_zh: 学习 Claude Code 最佳实践
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅提供参考文档。

skills.name: Obsidian Claude PKM
skills.description: Reference implementation of Claude + Obsidian personal knowledge management workflow. Useful for workflow design inspiration.
skills.notes: Reference implementation. Not a skill pack — study the workflow patterns.
skills.short_description: Reference implementation of Claude + Obsidian personal knowledge management workflow for workflow design inspiration.
skills.long_description: A reference implementation by ballred showing how to combine Claude Code with Obsidian for personal knowledge management. Demonstrates workflow patterns: daily notes, project tracking, research capture, and knowledge synthesis. Study the patterns to improve your own PKB workflow — not a skill to install, but a methodology to learn from.
best_for: Inspiration for custom PKB skill design
Learning how others combine Claude + Obsidian
not_for: Direct installation (workflow reference, not a skill)
skills.risk_explanation: Reference implementation. Review the workflow patterns for inspiration. No executable code to install. Adapt patterns to PKB's architecture, not the other way around.
skills.short_description_zh: Obsidian 个人知识管理与 Claude 集成。
skills.long_description_zh: 连接 Obsidian vault 与 Claude Code，支持双向同步和智能搜索。
best_for_zh: Obsidian 用户扩展 AI 能力
not_for_zh: 不使用 Obsidian 的用户
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 中风险。需配置 vault 路径。

skills.name: Daily Patterns Pack
skills.description: Daily note templates and recurring patterns for personal knowledge management. Template pack for workflow inspiration.
skills.notes: Template/reference pack. Review before adopting patterns into your PKB workflow.
skills.short_description: Daily note templates and recurring patterns for personal knowledge management. Template pack for workflow inspiration.
skills.long_description: A collection of daily note templates and recurring knowledge management patterns by aplaceforallmystuff. Includes templates for daily reflection, weekly review, project check-ins, and learning capture. Useful as inspiration for customizing your PKB workflow and wiki page templates.
best_for: Template inspiration for wiki page structures
not_for: Direct installation (template reference, not a skill)
Users who don't customize their workflow
skills.risk_explanation: Reference templates. No executable code. Review and adapt patterns to PKB's frontmatter conventions before using.
skills.short_description_zh: 日常使用模式和工作流模板集合。
skills.long_description_zh: 日常工作流模板包。每日笔记、周报、任务追踪、习惯记录等。
skills.risk_explanation_zh: 低风险。仅提供模板和本地脚本。
